descriptions.german: Lege für eine Verbesserung Ausrüstung an.
descriptions.japanese: 装備品を装備してアップグレード。

descriptions.english: [equipped]: The attached equipment gains +[effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger0.effect0.power][attack] permanently. [slay]: The attached equipment gains +[effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger1.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack] and [armor] [effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger1.effect0.upgrade.status0.power] permanently.
descriptions.french: <nobr>[equipped] :</nobr> l'équipement attaché gagne +[effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger0.effect0.power][attack] définitivement. <nobr>[slay] :</nobr> l'équipement attaché gagne +[effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger1.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack] et <nobr>[armor] [effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger1.effect0.upgrade.status0.power]</nobr> définitivement.

[slay]: Die zugehörige Ausrüstung erhält permanent +[effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger1.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack] und [armor] [effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger1.effect0.upgrade.status0.power].

[slay]: o equipamento acoplado recebe +[effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger1.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack] e [armor] [effect0.upgrade.charactertrigger1.effect0.upgrade.status0.power] permanentemente.
